code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result: List<Int> = []
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0

for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if not has_prev
      result = list.push(result, n)
      prev = n
      has_prev = true
    else if n != prev
      result = list.push(result, n)
      prev = n
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
let count = result.len()
mut i = 0
while i < count
  match result.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
